result.stdout:
Description:
  Dev Rating suggests the optimal Pull Request size for each contributor so that the PRs will have the same impact to the codebase.

Usage:
  devrating [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  update <pathspec>                  Update the rating by analyzing first-parent commits of the last 90 days
  update-by-one <commit> <pathspec>  Update the rating by analyzing a merge commit
  show <commit>                      Print previously applied commit details
  serialize <commit> <pathspec>      Serialize commit metadata
  apply                              Deserialize commit metadata and update the rating
  top                                Print the rating of active contributors for the last 90 days

commands.payload:
Description:
  Dev Rating suggests the optimal Pull Request size for each contributor so that the PRs will have the same impact to the codebase.

Usage:
  devrating [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  update <pathspec>                  Update the rating by analyzing first-parent commits of the last 90 days
  update-by-one <commit> <pathspec>  Update the rating by analyzing a merge commit
  show <commit>                      Print previously applied commit details
  serialize <commit> <pathspec>      Serialize commit metadata
  apply                              Deserialize commit metadata and update the rating
  top                                Print the rating of active contributors for the last 90 days

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deserialize commit metadata and update the rating

Usage:
  devrating apply [options]

Options:
  -j, --json <json> (REQUIRED)  Serialized commit metadata
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deserialize commit metadata and update the rating

Usage:
  devrating apply [options]

Options:
  -j, --json <json> (REQUIRED)  Serialized commit metadata
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Serialize commit metadata

Usage:
  devrating serialize [<commit> [<pathspec>...]] [options]

Arguments:
  <commit>    A merge commit
  <pathspec>  Sets `git diff` <path> argument

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path to a local repository. E.g. '~/repos/devrating' [default: .]
  -l, --link <link>  A link to the PR, issue or so
  -o, --org <org>    Name of the repository owner
  -n, --name <name>  Name of the repository
  -t, --time <time>  A moment when the PR was merged
  -v, --verbose      Verbose mode
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Description:
  Update the rating by analyzing first-parent commits of the last 90 days

Usage:
  devrating update [<pathspec>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <pathspec>  Sets `git diff` <path> argument

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path to a local repository. E.g. '~/repos/devrating' [default: .]
  -o, --org <org>    Name of the repository owner
  -n, --name <name>  Name of the repository
  -v, --verbose      Verbose mode
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
